sightline_y: Forward sight distance maintained for first 6 m from carriageway edge, increasing to 10 m or more for larger housing developments
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice on Wastewater Treatment and Disposal Systems Serving Single Houses 2010 (percolation)
residential_density_dph: Min 50 uph within 500 m of larger town centres; 35-50 dph medium towns; 40+ uph higher-order; <30 dph smaller/rural
separation_distance_m: 22 m above ground level between directly opposing windows; 0.9 m minimum in defined circumstances
public_open_space_pct: 0.6 ha casual play spaces (parks) + 0.2 ha equipped play space (playgrounds)
car_parking_dwelling: Dwelling 3-4 bedrooms: 1 space per bedroom; smaller units 1.5 per bed/unit in apartment contexts
trigger_AA: Natura/AA screening applies (statutory, handled in Volume 1); not a numeric trigger table in Appendix 1
trigger_EIA: EIA/EIAR screening/determination governed by Volume 1 and national regulations (not in Appendix 1)
trigger_FRA: FRA required with all development in flood-risk areas; 2009 Guidelines / Justification Test (§1.5)
trigger_AHIA: Works affecting protected structures/places of worship per Architectural Heritage Protection Guidelines (§9.2)
trigger_EcIA: Proposals affecting natural features/water quality must demonstrate no deterioration (§1.3)
trigger_TTA: Sightline/road standards reference TTA Guidelines 2014 (TTA above threshold)
notes: Rural one-off housing under Sustainable Rural Housing Guidelines 2005; no fixed minimum-site-area in Appendix 1 (rural policy in Volume 1). Two-column source PDF scrambles some table cells; raw/dm_standards.pdf is authoritative. EV charging 1 per 5 / 1 per 10 spaces.
